body.value: **The lower-right herbal form.** A bulbous green cabbage-like figure with small nude women clustered at its base — visually unlike the page's main top figure, more reminiscent of the herbal quire. Multi-figure pages like this blur the manuscript's quire boundaries: the categories herbal / balneological / cosmological were imposed by later scholars and don't always match how the original scribe partitioned content.
